steps.title: Recognize the complex series
steps.content: The sentence lists three responsibilities in a series. Each of the first two items contains an internal clause set off by commas, creating complex items with internal punctuation. The blank separates these items.

steps.title: Apply the semicolon rule for complex series
steps.content: A semicolon separates these two complex items correctly. The other choices blur item boundaries (A, B) or create a sentence fragment (D). That matches choice C — C is correct.
